name: Probability of rolling a six on one die
question_text: A fair six-sided die is rolled once. What is the probability of rolling a six?
general_feedback: There are six equally likely outcomes {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6}, and rolling a six is one of them, so the probability is 1/6.
correct_feedback: Correct — One favourable outcome out of six equally likely outcomes.

answers.feedback: One favourable outcome out of six equally likely outcomes.
That is the probability of rolling an even number, not of rolling a specific face.
That is the probability of rolling an even (or odd) number, not of a specific face.
1/36 is the probability of a specific pair when rolling two dice, not one.
